message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.diff + Series.shift (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.diff and Series.shift
sequence-displacement methods:

- diff_default (periods=1), diff_periods_2, diff_negative_periods
- shift_default (periods=1), shift_periods_3, shift_negative_periods

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesDiff and SeriesShift were already wired
in FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-uzf7x]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
